flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Stautzenberger College-Maumee rose 32% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.5k → $8.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Stautzenberger College-Maumee fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Stautzenberger College-Maumee rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (482 → 586).
